prompt: Треба вирішити як організувати кешування embeddings — Redis L2 cache чи збільшити in-memory LRU. Які ADR вже є по кешуванню?
assertions: Calls get_adrs to find existing caching decisions
Calls get_patterns to find caching patterns
Calls get_tech_debt to check known cache-related issues
Presents options with pros/cons based on existing architecture
Waits for user decision before recording ADR
